message:
Expand connector test coverage and harden fcp-sandbox

Connector test improvements (10 connectors):
- Split monolithic test functions into granular per-variant tests
  across datadog, elasticsearch, gitlab, reddit, salesforce, sentry,
  and twitter error.rs files (retry_after, display formatting, debug,
  retryable classification, FcpError conversion).
- Add new tests for non-retryable API error → FcpError conversion.
- hubspot connector.rs: Add config validation tests (token trimming,
  invalid/non-string credential_id), require_str helper tests,
  operations_info invariant checks (idempotency, id prefix),
  DoctorResult edge cases.
- jira connector.rs: Add config validation for email+token, credential_id,
  custom URLs, missing domain, conflicting auth. Plus require_str tests.
- linear connector.rs: Add config validation for api_key, credential_id,
  custom api_url, trimming, empty keys, conflicting auth.
- sentry connector.rs: Add operations invariant checks, config trimming,
  DoctorResult edge cases, initial counter verification.

fcp-sandbox hardening:
- sandbox.rs: Add apply_to_command() trait method with default no-op,
  enabling host-side sandbox application via pre_exec hooks.
- linux.rs: Move IOCTL and PRCTL from allowed syscalls to "graceful
  error" list (returns EPERM instead of SIGKILL). Remove KILL from
  allowlist. Implement apply_to_command via pre_exec with namespace
  unsharing (user, mount, IPC, UTS, optionally network).
- macos.rs: Implement apply_to_command via pre_exec with Seatbelt.
- windows.rs: Stub apply_to_command with warning (AppContainer needs
  STARTUPINFOEX not available via std::process::Command).
- egress.rs: Add wildcard ("*") host pattern support — canonicalize
  accepts it and is_host_allowed short-circuits to true.
- wasi.rs: Cap fuel at 1 trillion for 100% CPU (was unlimited/0,
  preventing infinite-loop DoS). Enforce MAX_TABLE_ELEMENTS=100,000
  for bounded table growth.

Also closes 10 beads issues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
